endpoints.name: GET /v1/autnum/{autnumId}
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{AUTNUMID}} with a real autnumid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/domain/{domainName}
endpoints.description: Look up RDAP information for a domain by name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DOMAINNAME}} with a real domainname.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/domains
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/entities
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/entity/{entityId}
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ENTITYID}} with a real entityid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/help
endpoints.description: Get help information for the RDAP API, including links to documentation.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/ip
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/ip/{ipId}/{ipId1}
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{IPID1}} with a real ipid1. Replace {{IPID}} with a real ipid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/nameserver/{nameserverId}
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAMESERVERID}} with a real nameserverid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/nameservers
endpoints.description: The RDAP API recognizes this command from the RDAP specification but does not support it. The response is a formatted 501 error.
